parsed_output.justification: Dylan explicitly claimed multiple times that he was the Werewolf ('I was the werewolf' in lines 91 and 151). Brett claimed to be the Troublemaker and stated that he swapped Dylan and Dan (lines 88 and 142). If both these claims are true, the Werewolf card was moved from Dylan to Dan, making Dan the current Werewolf.
